description_long: This is a bronze-colored bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of an older man with a mustache and short, combed hair. The figure is dressed in a collared shirt and jacket, with detailed facial features including deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and defined cheekbones. The bust is mounted on a rounded, slightly raised base that provides stability and a sense of formality. The surface has a polished, slightly mottled finish, giving it a realistic metallic sheen. The back of the sculpture is smooth and less detailed, focusing attention on the front and sides. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or historical figure, commonly found in public spaces or parks.
description: A polished bronze bust of an older man with a mustache, collared shirt, and jacket, mounted on a rounded base. The sculpture features realistic facial details and a metallic sheen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, mustache, and upper torso with a collared shirt and jacket.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, ear, and the curvature of the bust's base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the head, neck, and jacket, with minimal detail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the transition from head to shoulders.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture could be placed in an urban park, plaza, or public building.
